title: The Passport Program - Canada.ca
content:
## The Passport Program
The Passport Program is part of Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada. It's responsible for issuing, refusing to issue, revoking, withholding and recovering Canadian passports as well as providing instructions on their use.
You can get passport services at
- over 300 Service Canada locations
- Government of Canada offices abroad
- Apply for a new adult passport
- Apply for a passport for your child
- Check processing times
- Get a passport photo
- Find a passport service location near you
- Travel advice and passport validity
- Travel documents for non-Canadians
- Official travel: special and diplomatic passports
The Passport Program is funded entirely by application fees. Read the Canadian Passport Order for more information on the laws and regulations.
